expectations.evidence: Uses inventory__list_hosts with limit=20. Does not use vulnerability__get_systems.

Rationale states: 'The multi-step-workflows skill explicitly disambiguates: general list my systems requests use inventory__list_hosts (full fleet, source of truth), not vulnerability__get_systems (CVE-tracked subset only).'
States '47 registered systems' and shows first 20 with '...and 27 more.'
Table includes Display Name, OS, and Last Check-in columns.

Does NOT flag any stale check-in times. Several systems (ci-runner-01/02 last seen July 7, backup-server-01 last seen July 8 02:00) have check-ins older than 24 hours but this is not noted. guardrails-safety was listed as 'No' (not activated) in the skills table.
